Interface ClipboardReader

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, Closeable
All Known Implementing Classes:
FastSchematicReaderV2, FastSchematicReaderV3, MCEditSchematicReader, MinecraftStructure, NBTSchematicReader, SpongeSchematicV1Reader, SpongeSchematicV2Reader, SpongeSchematicV3Reader
public interface ClipboardReader extends Closeable
Reads Clipboards.
